name: Chocolate Shortbread Logs
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
In a large bowl, combine flour, butter, sugar and vanilla. Blend thoroughly.
Using a rounded teaspoon of dough for each cookie, shape with hands into 2-inch logs. To make shaping easier, you can coat each piece of dough very lightly with powdered sugar. Place the cookies about 1/2 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
Bake for 10 to 13 minutes. They should be barely golden brown on the bottom.
Remove cookies to a wire rack. Hot cookies are very fragile. Let cool thoroughly.
Heat chocolate chips and shortening together in the microwave on a low power level until just melted. Stir to combine.
Dip ends of each cooled cookie into chocolate. Place on a baking sheet lined with waxed paper.
Sprinkle walnuts over the ends. Chill until firm, about 1 hour.
Yield: 6 dozen.
